name: ASUS PRIME A520M-A II/CSM Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD A520 Chipset - Supports DDR4-4866(OC) - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 1x M.2 Socket3 - D-Sub - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.2 - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A - Gigabit LAN
shortName: ASUS PRIME A520M-A II/CSM Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD
description: Entry-level Micro ATX motherboard for AMD Ryzen with A520 chipset and basic connectivity features.
